case_title: PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. VS. KELLI LIDWELL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS, CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-21-2006 CONTINUED TO JUN-16-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT LIDWELL, KELLI
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. SERVED JAN-28-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIDWELL, KELLI
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT: 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT, CCP 585; 2. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS; 3. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT LIDWELL, KELLI DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-21-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-17-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-06-2006
DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIDWELL, KELLI $3,015.31 PRINCIPAL, $203.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,218.61, SEE SCANNED DOC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $203.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LIDWELL, KELLI
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
